textByHash.249a37889cb0287afb554417ffc0c8584eb89dc7: Hello there. You've come to the right place if you're looking for adventurer's equipment.
textByHash.4124a6f379144ed138fdec7a0a5924fffcecc807: Ordered by the king? What a load of rubbish! You mourners seem to think you own the place. Well you don't! Now clear off!
textByHash.4eb6d2467473e7bf21a5e9adef82eace733069ca: Ordered by the king? This is preposterous! We'll have to increase our prices to afford this, people will be furious!
textByHash.af1528b1587cc6a0031a78fb77a1355ee6bb3202: Hmph. Well, perhaps next time you'll need something from me?
textByHash.c76a8cd8c2478557baf5bdeaf6bbafb798ab9676: Ordered by the king? What a load of rubbish! I can see you're not one of his people. Stop fooling around and get lost!
